scripts.build:electron: npm run copy-app-icon && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npm run copy-tray-icon && vite build
scripts.copy-app-icon: mkdir -p public/logos && cp "../logos/jdlogo.png" electron/icon.png && cp "../logos/tray-icon.png" electron/tray-icon.png && cp "../logos/jdlogo.png" public/logos/jdlogo.png
scripts.electron:dev: npm run copy-app-icon && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npm run copy-tray-icon && concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
